query:
SELECT 'dailyRecapRequests' as t, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(sent_at) as last_sent, MAX(replied_at) as last_replied FROM dailyRecapRequests GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalFeeds' as t, COALESCE(lastSyncStatus,'-') as status, COUNT(*), MAX(lastSyncedAt), NULL FROM icalFeeds GROUP BY lastSyncStatus
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalEvents' as t, '-', COUNT(*), MAX(forDate), NULL FROM icalEvents
UNION ALL
SELECT 'weekly_digests' as t, email_status, COUNT(*), MAX(created_at), MAX(emailed_at) FROM weekly_digests GROUP BY email_status;
